popularStory.headline: Thomas and Mary Flagg
popularStory.description: Thomas Flagg is believed to have been born in Hardingham, Norfolk on May 6, 1621, and came to New England when he was 16, embarking at Norfolk in 1637. He settled at Watertown, Mass as early as 1641 a …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Flegg於1621年5月6日之前出生在英國諾福爾可哈丁加姆時，他的父親Allen Flegg47歲，母親Nazareth Devoroys11618歲。他於大約1640年與Mrs. Mary Flegg結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1698年2月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Flegg于1621年5月6日之前出生在英国諾福爾可哈丁加姆时，他的父亲Allen Flegg47岁，母亲Nazareth Devoroys11618岁。他于大约1640年与Mrs. Mary Flegg结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1698年2月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。

nameMeanings.name: Flegg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Flegg was born before 6 May 1621, in Hardingham, Norfolk, England, his father, Allen Flegg, was 47 and his mother, Nazareth Devoroys, was 11618. He married Mrs. Mary Flegg about 1640. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 6 February 1698, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Flegg est né avant 6 mai 1621, à Hardingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Allen Flegg, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Nazareth Devoroys, avait 11618 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Mary Flegg environ 1640. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 6 février 1698, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterré à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Flegg vor 6. Mai 1621 in Hardingham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Allen Flegg 47 und seine Mutter Nazareth Devoroys 11618. Er hat um 1640 Mrs. Mary Flegg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Februar 1698 in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Flegg è nato il prima del 6 maggio 1621 nel Hardingham, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Allen Flegg, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Nazareth Devoroys, aveva 11618 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Mary Flegg circa 1640. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 6 febbraio 1698, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e fu sepolto a Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Fleggが1621年5月6日以前にイギリスノーフォルクハーディンガムで生まれた時，父Allen Fleggは47歳，母Nazareth Devoroysは11618歳であった。約1640年にMrs. Mary Fleggと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1698年2月6日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンにて埋葬された。

ko.Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Americ: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이

ko.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운
ko.Lee, Strafford, New Hampshire, British C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 리
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Flegg(이)가 1621년 5월 6일 이전 영국 노르폴크 하르딩함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Allen Flegg(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Nazareth Devoroys(은)는 11618세였다. 그는 대략 1640년 Mrs. Mary Flegg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1698년 2월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Flegg nasceu antes 6 de maio de 1621, em Hardingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Allen Flegg, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Nazareth Devoroys, tinha 11618 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Mary Flegg aproximadamente 1640. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de fevereiro de 1698, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e foi sepultado em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Flegg родился перед 6 май 1621 г. в местности хардингхам, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Allen Flegg было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Nazareth Devoroys, 11618. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Mary Flegg около 1640 г. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 6 февраля 1698 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и был похоронен в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.
